case_title: HONGYING FANG VS. MELVIN D FONG

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 0.00 - SERVED MAR-29-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT FONG, MELVIN D

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE AS SETTLED. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF OR DEFENDANT. PER LAST HEARING, PARTIES INDICATED A SETTLEMENT WAS REACHED AND IF NO APPEARANCES AT THIS HEARING, MATTER TO BE DISMISSED W/PREJUDICE AS SETTLED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,950.00 FILED BY FANG, HONGYING AS TO DEFENDANT FONG, MELVIN D ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-17-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-17-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JUN-11-2018 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF HONGYING FANG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. AT THE TIME OF ROLL CALL PLAINTIFF INDICATED PARTIES CURRENTLY HAVE A TENTATIVE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN PLACE. IF NO APPEARANCES AT THE JUNE 11 HEARING, MATTER TO BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS SETTLED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
ORDER RE: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
COPYING FEES (5 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF FANG, HONGYING
